connections.title: Room connections
connections.description: Optional. Point at this room's power sensor and declare a door connecting it to another SmartPI room. Tick 'Add another connection' to declare more. Adding a connection on one room is enough — it is made bidirectional automatically.

error.invalid_valve_curve: The valve curve must satisfy minimum opening < knee opening < maximum opening.
error.connection_incomplete: Select both a connected room and a door sensor.
error.connection_self: A room cannot be connected to itself.
error.connection_duplicate: This room is already declared as a connection.
error.connection_not_smartpi: The connected room must be a thermostat using the SmartPI algorithm.

connections.title: Room connections
connections.description: Optional. Point at this room's power sensor and declare a door connecting it to another SmartPI room. Tick 'Add another connection' to declare more. Existing connections are kept; adding a connection on one room makes it bidirectional.
